session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of the vast, dark ocean at night is an awe-inspiring experience filled with a mix of fear and wonderment. The darkness seems almost tangible, enveloping you as if it will swallow everything in its path, yet it also holds within it untold mysteries waiting to be discovered. The wind whispers secrets through the trees, carrying the faintest scents of saltwater and distant shores. The stars twinkle above like diamonds scattered across an endless canvas, each one a promise of what lies ahead or has been seen before by someone else's eyes. It is both humbling and thrilling—a testament to our connection with the universe we inhabit yet still remain as insignificant in its grand scheme.
